title: corybas minimus
intro: Corybas minimus, also known as the greenhood orchid, is a terrestrial orchid species native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Corybas minimus are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea or tincture form, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
